channel.title: Clayton T Hickey
channel.description: Recent content on Clayton T Hickey

item.title: About
item.description:
About Me

Hi! I’m Clayton T Hickey. Welcome to my corner of the internet.

This site is built with Hugo and the Terminal theme.

Feel free to explore my blog posts and get to know me better!

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description:
Welcome!

This is my first post using the Hugo Terminal theme. The theme is minimal, retro, and perfect for a personal blog.

Features

  • 🎨 Clean, minimal design
  • ⚡ Fast and lightweight
  • 🌙 Customizable color schemes
  • 📱 Fully responsive

Feel free to add more content and customize this site to make it your own!
